narrative:
Richland Twp township has 1,538 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.7 percentage points.
